title: Celestial Domain
content:
See: 
World

The 
Celestial Domain
 was created to combat the Inner Realm Sealing Formations ability to prevent the existence of Joss Flames. Its purpose was to provide Cultivators with an alternate route so they could eventually reach the 3rd Step. 

The Celestial Domain, also known as the Celestial Realm, is one of the most sacred and ancient realms in the cultivation world. It is a divine sanctuary interwoven with the origins and legacies of the Ancient Celestials, beings who once stood at the peak of existence. Throughout history, this realm has been revered as the holy land of transcendence — a destination for cultivators who have reached the pinnacle of the mortal path, particularly those at or beyond the 
Soul Formation
 Stage. Within this realm lies the purest form of Celestial Spiritual Energy, an energy source that enables cultivators to ascend to true celestial status and transcend mortality itself.

In ancient times, the Celestial Realm existed as a single, unified domain governed by the Ancient Celestials. It served as the guardian foundation of all life and the axis around which the cosmic balance revolved. However, an immense calamity shattered this divine dominion, causing it to collapse and fragment into four great realms — the Wind, Rain, Thunder, and Lightning Celestial Realms. Each of these realms came to govern different star systems and developed its own distinct laws, environments, and cultivation paths. Beyond these four fragments lies the 
Ancient Celestial Realm
, a primeval version of the Celestial Domain that predates the others, and from which all celestial power and history ultimately originate.

Access to the Celestial Realm is controlled through the Celestial Doors, ancient portals that serve as gateways between cultivation planets and the divine domain. There are four known Celestial Doors, each corresponding to one of the elemental Celestial Realms. These gates are protected by intricate formations and guarded by ancient rites, requiring powerful rituals or divine instruments — such as the celestial cauldrons — to activate. Passing through one of these doors signifies a cultivator’s formal ascension into the celestial path and is considered an act of profound spiritual transformation.

The realm itself is saturated with Celestial Spiritual Energy (天灵气) — a refined, pure, and vastly more potent form of energy than ordinary spiritual energy. This celestial essence is vital for cultivators seeking to advance beyond mortal limitations. When refined, it merges with the cultivator’s origin energy to form Celestial Origin Energy (天源之气), granting immense power and allowing mastery over celestial spells and laws. Celestial Spiritual Energy also functions as a key in divine mechanisms, such as opening Celestial Gates or activating sacred cauldrons like the Rain Cauldron, which are essential for celestial-level cultivation.

Throughout the Celestial Realm’s history, numerous competitions and ceremonies have been held to bestow Celestial Titles upon exceptional cultivators. Institutions like the Thunder Celestial Temple act as centers of divine selection, recognizing those who demonstrate extraordinary strength and enlightenment. Receiving a Celestial Title elevates a cultivator’s status to that of a semi-divine being, granting access to celestial treasures, forbidden techniques, and personal instruction from Celestial Lords themselves. The spells and divine arts learned within the realm are magnitudes stronger than any mortal technique, often embodying the pure essence of the world’s elemental forces.

Following its collapse, the Celestial Realm endured countless ages of ruin and desolation. Many of its fragments, especially the 
Thunder Celestial Realm
, were left in near-total devastation. Despite this, efforts have emerged in later eras to reconstruct and reunify the fragmented realms into a single divine domain. The 
Wind Celestial Realm
, which remained relatively intact due to the protection of ancient mosquito beasts, now serves as the foundation of the New Celestial Realm. The Silver River of the Lightning Realm surrounds it as a barrier of protection, representing the first step toward restoring the ancient celestial order. This reformation seeks to reestablish the Celestial Realm as the ultimate cultivation ground for Inner Realm cultivators, granting them renewed access to Celestial Spiritual Energy and Joss Flames — the divine essence of life and worship
